visual_analysis.description: A clear plastic bottle of water with a blue cap, positioned behind other cans.
A green aluminum can with 'Sprite' branding, located in front and to the left of the water bottle.
A red aluminum can with 'Coca-Cola' branding, located in front and to the right of the water bottle.
A white can with 'Milkis' branding on the far left.
A black can labeled 'SODA WATER' next to the white can.

action_plan.explanation: The green soda can is blocking the left front side of the clear water bottle and must be moved to create a clear path.
The red soda can is blocking the right front side of the clear water bottle and must be moved to create a clear path.
The path to the clear water bottle is now clear, and it can be picked up.
